tiers.label: Title Sponsor
tiers.description: Premier brand placement — logo on all materials, featured on every page, presenting sponsor recognition.

tiers.label: Court Sponsor
tiers.description: Named court sponsorship — logo on court signage, website, and printed schedule.

tiers.label: Trophy Sponsor
tiers.description: Logo on trophy table, website, and awards ceremony recognition.

tiers.label: Community Friend
tiers.description: Name/logo on website and event program.

tiers.label: In-Kind
tiers.description: Donated goods or services. Recognition on website and event day.
